text:
SELLER PROFILE: seller_42 (São Paulo, SP)
Category: Electronics, Home & Garden
Total Orders: 234 | On-Time: 60% | Avg Rating: 2.3/5
Known Issues: Chronic late delivery (40% >5 days late)
Status: Under performance review since Q3 2017
Customer complaints: 47 (delivery: 31, quality: 12, communication: 4)
Revenue impact: R$34,200 in refunds issued
Action: Final warning issued Jan 2018. Next violation triggers suspension.

SELLER PROFILE: seller_7 (Rio de Janeiro, RJ)
Category: Health & Beauty, Sports & Leisure
Total Orders: 312 | On-Time: 98% | Avg Rating: 4.8/5
Known Issues: None
Status: Gold Tier Seller since Q2 2017
Customer complaints: 3 (all resolved same day)
Revenue impact: R$0 in refunds (lowest on platform)
Action: Featured seller candidate for Q1 2018 promotions.

SELLER PROFILE: seller_18 (Campinas, SP)
Category: Electronics, Computers & Accessories
Total Orders: 145 | On-Time: 65% | Avg Rating: 2.8/5
Known Issues: Frequent delays, product quality concerns
Status: Under quality review since Nov 2017
Customer complaints: 28 (delivery: 18, quality: 8, communication: 2)
Revenue impact: R$12,400 in refunds issued

CUSTOMER PROFILE: cust_1234 (São Paulo, SP)
Total Orders: 9 | Avg Review Score: 2.9 | Total Spent: R$2,126.32
Complaint History: 3 complaints (all against seller_42)
Issues: Repeated delivery delays, damaged products
Risk: High churn risk — frustration escalating with each order
Recommendation: Assign dedicated support, offer loyalty credit

CATEGORY PROFILE: Electronics
Total Products: ~2,500 | Avg Review Score: 2.9/5 (BELOW 3.5 threshold)
Return Rate: 12.5% (highest on platform)
Top Issues: Description mismatch (35%), defective on arrival (25%), late delivery (20%)
Problem Sellers: seller_42, seller_18, seller_44
Recommendation: Mandatory quality audit for all electronics sellers with >50 orders

REGION PROFILE: São Paulo State (SP)
Total Sellers: ~800 | Total Orders: ~35,000
Avg Delivery Time: 4.2 days | On-Time Rate: 82%
Top Sellers: seller_9 (95% on-time), seller_42 (60% on-time — outlier)
Key Issue: Electronics sellers in SP have 35% late rate vs 15% platform avg
Seasonal Pattern: December delays spike 40% due to holiday volume

SELLER PROFILE: seller_31 (Porto Alegre, RS)
Category: Electronics, Telephony
Total Orders: 201 | On-Time: 78% | Avg Rating: 3.5/5
Known Issues: Moderate delivery delays, occasional quality issues
Status: Warning issued Q4 2017
Customer complaints: 22 (delivery: 15, quality: 5, other: 2)

SELLER PROFILE: seller_33 (Brasília, DF)
Category: Telephony, Electronics
Total Orders: 112 | On-Time: 72% | Avg Rating: 3.2/5
Known Issues: Holiday season reliability problems
Status: Under review for December failures
Customer complaints: 18 (delivery: 14, quality: 3, communication: 1)
Notable: ORD_LATE04 arrived after Christmas, resulted in full refund + R$50 credit
